steps.title: Substitute d = 36 into the equation
steps.content:
Replace $d$ with 36 in the given equation $1.5c + 3d = 108$.
$$1.5c + 3(36) = 108$$
Multiply: $3 \times 36 = 108$.
$$1.5c + 108 = 108$$

steps.title: Solve for c
steps.content:
Subtract 108 from both sides:
$$1.5c = 0$$
Divide both sides by 1.5:
$$c = 0$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
